step_rationale: Mineral metabolism regulator; associated with ACS but not mechanistic to atherothrombotic cascade.
mechanism: Parathyroid hormone dysregulation in acute coronary syndrome reflects systemic mineral metabolic disorder off the atherothrombotic pathway.

references.title: Increase of renal resistive index and mineral metabolism disorder in patients with acute coronary syndrome with preserved renal function.
references.journal: European review for medical and pharmacological sciences
